user.title: Easy-care by Waterair — Setup
user.description:
**Step 1 — Authorize**

Click **[here]({authorize_url})** to log in with your Waterair account.

If the link does not open, copy and paste this URL into your browser:
`{authorize_url_raw}`

**Step 2 — Copy the code**

After login, the browser will show an error (msauth:// redirect — this is normal). **Copy the full URL** from the address bar, then paste it below.

> Tip: on mobile or if the address bar is hidden, use your browser's developer tools (F12 → Network) to find the redirect URL.

reauth_confirm.title: Easy-care — Re-authentication needed
reauth_confirm.description:
Your session has expired.

Click **[here]({authorize_url})** to log in again, or copy this URL into your browser:
`{authorize_url_raw}`

After login, copy the redirect URL (msauth://...) from the address bar and paste it below.

error.invalid_auth_code: Invalid or expired authorization code. Please try again with a fresh code.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach Waterair servers. Check your internet connection.
error.timeout: The Waterair server took too long to respond. Try again.
error.invalid_pool_id: This pool number does not exist on your account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See logs for details.

pump_on.name: Pump on
pump_on.description: Start the filtration pump for a given duration.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: BOOST4H, BOOST12H, BOOST24H, BOOST36H, BOOST48H or BOOST72H.

refresh_data.name: Refresh data
refresh_data.description: Force a refresh from Waterair servers.
